english_query: And are not all things either good or bad, or in the middle and not caring?
ugf_response: To be sure, old teacher.

english_query: Also, the old teacher who thinks well says nothing holds itself. But the tie is in the one; and we cannot say this is because they are the same, for then the tie would be in what god really is. So the tie, or mark, is not the same as the one in god.
ugf_response: The marks are said to be in what god really is, only by being the same; but in the ones they are there by being the same, not just in truth, but also in how we speak of them; like how a shape is in the thing it shapes. So the marks set and tell the ones different, but not what god really is.

english_query: I am sure, the old teacher, that you have got from me a lot more than was ever in me.
ugf_response: And does not my work show that the bright young one bring out wind, and that the things that come from the bright young one mind are not good enough to bring up?

english_query: When a person at the time of learning writes the name of the first man, and thinks that he should write and does write the first two letters; but, again, meaning to write the name of the second man, thinks that he should write and does write the first two letters--can we suppose that he knows the first parts of your two names?
ugf_response: We have already said that such a one has not yet gotten what someone knows.

english_query: Also, things that do not touch each other cannot be in one spot. But not all the water touches, so they were not all put in one spot.
ugf_response: All water goes to the big sea, going through hidden or seen paths, which is why we say they are in one spot. Or, 'one spot' means just the water part, different from the dry land part. This is shown by the words that call the water group 'Seas', meaning they are in more than one spot.

english_query: It looks like the bright spirits know things by taking marks from those things. Because everything known is held by some mark inside the one who knows it. But the mark of a thing in another is either a plan that makes the thing, or a mark made by the thing. So all knowing must either make the thing known, or be made by it. Now the knowing of the bright spirits does not make real things; only the knowing of god does that. So the marks the bright spirits use to know must come from the things.
ugf_response: There are marks of living things in the mind of the bright spirits, not taken from the living things, but from god, who makes living things, and in whom the marks of living things are first. So the old church teacher says that just as the plan for a living thing is in the word of god before the living thing, so the knowing of that plan is first in the thinking creature, and then helps make the creature.

english_query: Also, things in one group seem to be of one kind. But the great old church teacher puts the feeling part against the high and low thinking parts, which are about knowing. So the feeling part is also about knowing.
ugf_response: The feeling part is put against high and low thinking because they all share the act of moving: for the power of knowing, which has high and low thinking, is a power that moves; as is the power of wanting, which has the feeling part.

english_query: Also, anything that is here at one time and not at another is changed by time. But the spirit helper is above time, as the old book on causes says. So the spirit helper is not here at one time and gone at another, but is always here.
ugf_response: The spirit helper is above the time that counts the moving of the sky; because he is above all moving of body things. But he is not above the time that counts how his being comes after his not being, and how his doing comes one after another. So the old church teacher says that 'God moves the spirit thing by time.'

english_query: It looks like a thing that is known in full is more perfect than a thing that is known in a wide way; because to know a thing in a wide way is in a sense in the center between maybe and true. So if the higher ones know by more wide kinds than the lower ones, then the higher have a less perfect what is known than the lower and that is not right.
ugf_response: There are two ways to think about knowing something in a wide way. First, looking at the thing itself we only know its wide kind. Knowing a thing that way is less perfect it is like only knowing a man as an animal. Second, looking at the way we do the knowing. In this way it is more perfect to know a thing in a wide way because the mind that can use one wide way to know each thing inside it is more perfect than a mind that cannot.

english_query: Also, in god there is no real way to tell them as not the same but that of coming from. But one way of being toward does not seem to come from another. So the ways of being toward are not really told as not the same from each other.
ugf_response: Even though ways of being toward, for true, do not come or go from each other, still they are seen as against each other by the going of one from another.

english_query: And could the same be said about playing music and other things people do? Would a person who wants to make another a music maker say no to sending them to people who say they teach the thing for money and ask other people who are not teachers and have never taught anyone in that part of what people know to help would that be a big wrong?
ugf_response: Yes that is a big wrong and also not know

english_query: Has any of the people who teach for money done you wrong, angry man? What makes you so mad at them?
ugf_response: No, for sure, not I and not any of my things have ever had, nor would I let them have, anything to do with them.

english_query: It looks like the name 'god' can be shared. Because if you share in the thing a name means, you share the name too. But this name 'god' means what god is, which can be shared with others, as it is said that we may have a part in what god is. So this name 'god' can be given to others.
ugf_response: What god is is only shared by being a bit like it.

english_query: Also, there is the story sense, which is not one of those four.
ugf_response: The story sense is inside the real sense, because words show things in a true way and in a picture way. The picture itself is not the real sense, but what the picture shows is. When the book to do with god talks about the arm of the one who makes all, the real sense is not that the one who makes all has a body part, but what that part shows, which is power to do. So it is clear that nothing wrong can ever be under the real sense of the book to do with god.

english_query: It looks like bad spirits cannot lead people wrong by doing real great signs. For the bad spirits will show this most in the works of the man against the one sent by god. But as the old teacher says, his coming is by the work of the bad one, with all power, and signs, and lying wonders. So much more at other times do the bad spirits do lying wonders.
ugf_response: As the great old church teacher says, the works of the man against the one sent by god can be called lying wonders, either because he will hide the truth from the eyes of people with sights that are not real, so he will not really do what he seems to do; or because, if he does real great signs, they will lead people into wrong ideas who believe in him.

english_query: It looks like the part of us that wants things must want them by force, no matter what. Because an old teacher says that bad things are not what we want. So the part that wants must always want the good thing shown to it.
ugf_response: The part that wants can only go after things as good things. But because good things come in many kinds, the part that wants is not forced to pick just one.

english_query: Such a guess, old teacher, is big and has no sense.
ugf_response: But if he cannot know both without knowing each, then if he is ever to know the group of sounds, he must know the small sounds first; and so the good idea has again taken wings and gone away.

english_query: Also, our mind knows itself. But in itself it is one single thing, else it could not do its own work; for doing things belongs to single things. So our mind knows single things.
ugf_response: Being able to be known does not go with the single thing as such, but as made of stuff, for nothing can be known unless it is not made of stuff. So if there is a single thing not made of stuff, like the mind, there is no reason it should not be able to be known.

english_query: It looks like a made mind can see what god really is by its own power. For a man able to think well says a spirit is a clear mirror that holds all of the good looks of god. But if you see a look in a mirror, you see the thing itself. So since a spirit knows itself by its own power, it seems it can know what god really is by its own power.
ugf_response: This way of knowing god is normal for a spirit: to know him by his look bright in the spirit. But to know god by any made look is not to know what god really is, as was shown before. So it does not follow that a spirit can know what god really is by its own power.

english_query: Also the great old church teacher says that men who use bad spirits do big things by talks just for them; good god people do them by the right way for all; bad god people do them by signs of the right way for all. But men who use bad spirits do big things because the bad spirits hear them. So the bad spirits can do big things. So much more can the good spirits.
ugf_response: True big things are those done outside the normal way of all made things. But we do not know all the power of made things. So when something is done outside the normal way by a power we do not know, we call it a big thing for us. So when bad spirits do things with their own power, we call them big things only for us, not in truth. This is how men who use bad spirits do big things through bad spirits; these are called talks just for them, because the power of a made thing is like the power of one person in a town. So when a man who uses bad spirits does something by talk with the bad one, it is like a talk just for him. On the other side, the right way of god is in all things like the law of the town. So good god people, who do big things by the right way of god, are said to do them by the right way for all: but bad god people by the signs of the right way for all, like saying the name of the one god became man, or using other signs to do with god.

english_query: Not in a suit, the man who knows about god; the word the people in the city use is to ask the law to stop someone.
ugf_response: What! I suppose that some one has been asking the law to stop you, for I cannot believe that you are the one asking the law to stop another.

english_query: And do even you, old teacher, really think what you are saying now about speaking well? What! because the well known teacher of speaking did not want to say no that the speaker knew what is right and good, and said that to anyone who came to him not knowing them he could teach them, and then from this saying there came a fight-the thing which you love very much, and to which not he, but you, brought the talk by your hard questions-(do you really think there is any truth in all this?) For will anyone ever say that he does not know, or cannot teach, the way things are right? The truth is, it is not nice to bring the talk to such a point.
ugf_response: Great hot one, the reason why we get friends and children is, that when we get old and fall, a younger group may be near to help us stand up again in our words and in our doing: and now, if I and the well known teacher of speaking are falling, here are you who should help us up; and I for my part promise to take back any wrong thing into which you may think that I have fallen-upon one thing:

english_query: I certainly thought just now that we were right.
ugf_response: Yes young man; but a thing that is true should stay strong not only just now, but always.

english_query: What do you mean, old teacher?
ugf_response: Maybe nothing. But I will try to show what I think I mean: When you talk about the work of making shoes, you mean the way of making shoes?

english_query: I should imagine that the scared people have more bad feelings.
ugf_response: And are they not happier when the bad guys leave?

english_query: Also, people of the same kind get to be good in the same way. Now other people did not know all things from the start, but they learn them over time as they can. So the first man did not know all things when he was first made.
ugf_response: The first man was given a size of being good that was not given to other people, as was shown before.

english_query: It seems that there are more than two ways of coming from god. Because we say god knows and wills, and also that he has the power to do things. So if there are two ways of coming, one from knowing and one from willing, it looks like there must be a third way from his power.
ugf_response: Power is what lets a thing do things to other things. So when god does things outside of himself, that shows his power. But this power does not mean another part of god comes from him; instead, it is shown by the things he makes coming from him.

english_query: It looks like the top sky was not made at the same time as the stuff without form. For the top sky, if it is anything, must be a body we can see. But all bodies we can see can move, and the top sky does not move. For if it did, we would know by seeing some body move, which we do not. So the top sky was not made at the same time as the stuff without form.
ugf_response: Bodies we can see can move now because the parts of the world are many and changing. But when the end is here, bodies will stop moving. And this must have been the way of the top sky from the start.

english_query: Also, the old teacher who thought much says truth is a good way of being that is not the same as being right in giving. So truth is not part of what being right in giving means.
ugf_response: The truth the old teacher talks about here is the good way of being where a person shows in word and act who he really is. This is about fitting the sign to the thing shown; it is not about fitting the thing made to what makes it and what leads it: as was said about the truth of being right in giving.

english_query: It seems our mind can know the thing without end. For God is bigger than all things without end. But our mind can know God, as we said before. So much more can our mind know all other things without end.
ugf_response: God is called without end because his true shape is not held back by stuff; but in things made of stuff, without end means missing a true shape. We know true shape, but we cannot know stuff without shape. So the thing without end in stuff is not known. But God, who is without end in shape, is known by himself; but we do not know him because our mind is not strong and only fits for stuff now. So we cannot know God now except by seeing what stuff he made. Later, our mind will be fixed, and we will see what God is, but we will not hold all of him in our mind.

english_query: The people are sure of this sad truth. Life is hard; people are not happy; we are not good; fun, money, and being liked do not make us full. These words are used a lot in all talks. Who can say this is not true when everyone says it from their own feel?
ugf_response: The ones who know a lot agree with the many. In all books, from the church or not, people write with strong words about how sad life is. The writers who write from heart, not from a plan, show this most. From the old writer to the new, they all see that only this sad view fits what each person feels and sees.

english_query: Not so much, the hot one, as he who kills him, and not so much as he who is right killed.
ugf_response: How can that be, the old teacher?

english_query: Also, the thinking soul is better than the stuff that makes up bodies. But God made that stuff with shapes it can take. So much more did God make the thinking soul with ideas it can know. And so the soul knows body things by ideas it has from the start.
ugf_response: The stuff that makes up bodies needs a shape to be real, so it had to be made with a shape: else it would not be there. But once it has one shape, it can take others. On the other hand, the mind does not need an idea to be real; and so the two are not the same.

english_query: If god chooses to leave some men out, it must be the same for them as it is for those he picks. But picking someone is the reason they get to be safe. So leaving someone out would be the reason they get lost. But this is not right. For the words say: 'Your end is your own, people of the old land; Your help is only in Me.' So god does not choose to leave any man out.
ugf_response: Leaving out is not the same as picking. Picking is the cause of what they get later, like being great, and what they get now, like good help. But leaving out is not the cause of what they do now, like doing wrong; it is the cause of god turning away. It is the cause of what they get later, like long pain. But the wrong comes from the free choice of the person who is left out and has no good help. This makes the words of the old speaker true: 'Your end is your own, people of the old land.'

english_query: Yes old teacher, with a view to the making of a boat.
ugf_response: As there is a way of doing things which helps the person who builds a home with a view to the making of a home?

english_query: It seems that the name 'god' means one thing. When a name means different things, people do not say things that go against each other. But a person who follows the true way says 'this made thing is not god' and a person who follows the wrong way says 'this made thing is god'. They say things that go against each other. So the name 'god' must mean one thing for both.
ugf_response: The number of meanings does not come from who uses the name, but from what the name points to. The name 'man' has one meaning, even if we use it for real men or not real men. It would have many meanings if one person used it for a person and another for a stone. So the person who follows the true way and the person who follows the wrong way say things that go against each other because they both use the name 'god' to point to the true god. The person who follows the wrong way does not use the name to mean 'god in his head', because then he would be right, as people who follow the true way sometimes do when they say 'the gods of others are bad spirits'. This is why the other points fail: they look at how we speak, not what the words mean.

english_query: It is as if the way things end up is in things that have life then it is what a thing is or just is and it is one or other has to be many for every thing that has life so the way things end up is as if just one so it is not in things that have life but in the one who is all
ugf_response: The way things end up is a thing not that thing that is a bit of what something is but it means a spot which is not what a thing is but together and if this spot is seen by its first why it is just one so the way things end up is just one but if it is seen by its other why or by other reasons this way things end up is many in this way a person said "Your road moves you."

english_query: Then, as we both agree that a person should ask about what he does not know, should you and I try to ask together about what being good is?
ugf_response: By all means, the old teacher. And yet I would rather go back to my first question, whether when we try to get being good we should think it is something that can be taught, or a gift from the way things are, or something that comes to people in another way?

english_query: Yes, that was also said.
ugf_response: And what kind of thing not being the same makes people hate each other and get mad? Say for one thing that you and I, my good friend, do not see eye to eye about a number; do things not being the same like this make us people who fight and cause us to have trouble? Do we not go right away to counting, and stop them by adding it up?

english_query: How is that possible, old teacher, either in this case or any other thing--if while we are using the word the thing is going away in the change?
ugf_response: And what would you say of things like seeing and hearing, or any other kind of feeling? Is there any stopping in the act of seeing and hearing?
